# CWE-267 — Privilege Defined With Unsafe Actions (vulnerable)
lang: go
file: CWE-267-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"os"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

// Vulnerable: "reviewer" role may delete arbitrary paths from disk.
func ReviewerPurge(c *gin.Context) {
	if c.GetString("role") != "reviewer" {
		c.JSON(403, gin.H{"error": "forbidden"})
		return
	}
	target := c.Query("path")
	_ = os.Remove(target)
	c.JSON(200, gin.H{"removed": target})
}
